meaning: n.理想主义者adj.唯心主义的
examples: He is a political pragmatist, not an idealist.
He is not such an idealist that he cannot see the problems.
Unfortunately, in our western tradition, neither materialist nor idealist theoreticians give enough consideration to this basic condition for life.
Mr. BENJAMIN: I guess an idealist, you know, pretty much a dreamer, you know.
Coen Gilbert, who has both an idealist's fervor and a marketer's flair, recruits new companies.
